text.title: Security ADR Pack Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every application of `Security ADR Pack` must enforce. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Pack MUST include ADR-SEC-01 'Authentication & Authorisation Model' covering: principal type, protocol, session/token, RBAC/ABAC/ReBAC, rotation. Any missing sub-field = INCOMPLETE.
rule.rationale: Auth is the most-audited and most-deferred topic; the template prevents 'we'll figure it out later'.

rule.statement: Pack MUST include ADR-SEC-02 'Encryption' covering: at-rest cipher + key manager, in-transit floor (TLS version + cipher policy), end-to-end vs hop-to-hop, KMS rotation; ADR MUST cite NIST/FIPS/SOG-IS reference.
rule.rationale: Encryption decisions default to provider defaults silently. Forced citation makes the decision defensible.

rule.statement: Pack MUST include ADR-SEC-03 'Secrets Management' covering: storage (Vault/KMS/SOPS), fetch-at-startup pattern, rotation cadence, audit-log retention, breakglass; ADR MUST link to secret-consumer-discovery + secret-rotation-drill methodologies.
rule.rationale: Storage is easy; consumer enumeration + drill cadence is what auditors verify.

rule.statement: Pack MUST include ADR-SEC-04 'Isolation Tier' covering: blast-radius classification, network isolation policy, compute isolation, data isolation; ADR MUST state the trust boundary explicitly.
rule.rationale: 'Multi-tenant' without an isolation ADR is hand-waving.

rule.statement: Pack MUST include ADR-SEC-05 'Data Residency & Sovereignty' covering: regions holding customer data (storage + backups + telemetry), cross-region flows, residency commitment (GDPR / Schrems II / localisation), deletion-SLA; reviewable per-customer not just per-product.
rule.rationale: Residency delegated to legal → wrong because legal didn't know about the analytics warehouse.

rule.statement: When preconditions in `Applies If` fail OR any item in `Skip If` triggers, do not run this methodology. Document the skip rationale in the artefact's parent log.
rule.rationale: Misapplied methodologies are worse than no methodology — they consume review cycles and produce false confidence.
